home.aboutText: I'm a Full Stack Software Engineer with a focus on clean architecture, performance and user experience. I partner with international teams to ship products that are reliable, maintainable and ready for production.
home.skillsSubtitle: A balanced skill set across frontend, backend, cloud and tooling.

home.contactSubtitle: Open to full-time roles and contract opportunities across Canada, France, Germany, the UK and the US.

about.label: About Me
about.title: Building Digital Products That Make an Impact
about.subtitle: Passionate about designing and developing scalable digital solutions that solve real-world business problems.
paragraphs: I'm a Full Stack Software Engineer passionate about building modern web applications and digital products that create meaningful value for users and businesses.
I design complete solutions — from intuitive user interfaces to robust backend architecture and thoughtful database management — ensuring every layer works together seamlessly.
My experience includes developing e-commerce platforms, fintech applications and business management software, turning complex requirements into reliable, production-ready products.
I believe in continuous learning, writing clean code, collaborating effectively with teams and building software designed to deliver long-term value.

values.title: Core Values
items: Quality over quantity — every detail matters in production software
Clear communication across cultures, languages and time zones
Continuous learning with pragmatic, results-driven innovation
User-centered design paired with engineering excellence

skills.title: Skills
skills.subtitle: Technologies and tools I use to design, build and deploy modern, production-ready applications.

projects.title: Projects
projects.subtitle: Products and platforms I've designed and built — from architecture to deployment.

yorix.title: Yorix Marketplace
yorix.description: A multi-vendor e-commerce marketplace connecting buyers and sellers with secure payments, real-time inventory and a streamlined shopping experience.
features: Secure checkout with Stripe payment integration
Advanced product search, filters and categories
Order tracking and automated email notifications

hodix.title: HODIX Fintech
hodix.description: Africa's first super-app for digital tontines and verifiable financial identity — transforming informal community savings into a trusted financial reputation for emerging markets and the diaspora.
features: Digital tontines with automated cycles, reminders and member tracking
Trust Score (0–1000) and tiered identity levels — Bronze to Platinum
Verifiable Financial Identity certificates with QR, hash and public link
Multi-currency wallet (XAF, EUR, USD) with MTN & Orange Money integration
Admin console for members, KYC validation and tontine management

portfolio.title: Personal Portfolio
portfolio.description: A production-ready developer portfolio showcasing projects and skills — optimized for performance, accessibility and international recruiters.
features: Bilingual support with English and French (EN/FR)
SEO optimized with Open Graph and structured metadata
Smooth animations and fully responsive layout

digitalGroup.title: Yorix Digital
digitalGroup.description: An internal offline business management software built for Yorix operations — handling workflows, data and day-to-day processes in a secure, self-contained environment.
features: Internal offline-first architecture for reliable field use
Business workflow and operational data management
Secure access for authorized team members only
Deployed on Vercel for controlled internal access
